===Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer===
[[File:N B2W2 Trailer.png|thumb|250px|N in the animated trailer]]
N appeared in the beginning of the [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]], in which he was seen at [[Dragonspiral Tower]], telling the viewers to think of their Pokémon and asking them what they are striving for.
